creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-04-26 23:45:29 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/grdc-applet      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Grdc is a remote desktop client based on GTK+ and GNOME.
  
  The Grdc GNOME applet:
  
   * A GNOME Desktop applet for easy-access of Grdc main features
   * List all remote desktop files and make the connection easily
   * Support remote desktop files grouping feature
  
  WWW: http://grdc.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/133955
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2100    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/net/grdc-applet/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/grdc-applet/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/net/grdc-applet/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/net/grdc-applet/pkg-plist (new)
